function.name: query_plan
function.description: Build a structured web research plan from a user's request, including topic, goal, search queries, coverage points, and keywords.

user_request.description: The user's natural language research request.

grounding.description: Optional term grounding payload used for anchored planning.

prior_plan.description: Previous active plan used for replanning.

gap_directions.description: Gap directions derived from evidence summaries.

used_queries.description: Queries already consumed in previous cycles.
